name: cockroachsql provider
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client && go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest
postStartCommand: PGCLIENTENCODING=utf8 psql 'postgresql://root@cockroachdb:26257/defaultdb?sslmode=disable' -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS tf_tests; CREATE DATABASE tf_tests;'
